commits: 39ba4b6: test(transparency): RED — tiny-budget byte-bound + string-bool config coercion tests
29b81f2: fix(transparency): OBS-core review — byte-bound omit on tiny budget; sane string-bool config coercion
summary: Fix 1: mutations_header now returns '' instead of over-budget '…+N more' suffix when even the suffix exceeds budget_bytes, honoring the invariant that result.encode('utf-8') <= budget_bytes always. Fix 2: _coerce_bool helper added; treats 'false','0','off','no','' as False and 'true','1','on','yes' as True for string values, applied to served_headers and attribute_accounting_to_served in load_transparency_config.
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.0-OBS-core-fix on branch obs-core at 29b81f2; review, verify, merge
